pr.title: [Non-record] 1-Stage Byte-level H-Net at 17.5M: Dynamic Chunking Learns Word Boundaries (39x-91x fewer params than H-Net paper)

output.summary: Byte-level 1-stage H-Net learns whitespace-aligned word boundaries via dynamic chunking while matched byte vs subword runs trace compression behavior.
techniques: Dynamic chunking router using cosine dissimilarity to pick learned boundaries
DDP training with padded chunk sequences across 8×H100
Matched byte260 vs sp1024 ablations with boundary metrics
